debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
hB : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), N = sSup (B N hN)
hB' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), sSupIndep (B N hN)
hB'' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), ⊥ ∉ B N hN
H : ∃ N, ∃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN ≠ {N}
⊢ @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition.refinement C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M D B hB hB' hB'' < D

failed_attempts:
by
  refine lt_of_le_of_ne (refinement_le B hB hB' hB'') ?_
  intro h_eq
  obtain ⟨N, hN, h_ne⟩ := H
  have h_N_in_ref : N ∈ (refinement B hB hB' hB'').carrier := h_eq ▸ hN
  simp only [refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at h_N_in_ref
  obtain ⟨M, hM, h_N_in_B⟩ := h_N_in_ref
  have h_NM : N = M := by
    by_contra h_diff
    have h_le : N ≤ M := (hB M hM).symm ▸ le_sSup h_N_in_B
    have h_disj : Disjoint N M := Disjoint.mono_right (le_sSup ⟨hM, h_diff.symm⟩) (D.sSupIndep' hN)
    exact D.not_bot_mem' <| disjoint_self.mp (Disjoint.mono_left h_le h_disj) ▸ hN
  subst h_NM
  have h_B_eq : B N hN = {N} := by
    ext P
    constructor
    · intro hP
      have h_P_in_D : P ∈ D.carrier := h_eq ▸ Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨N, Set.mem_iUnion.mpr ⟨hN, hP⟩⟩
      have h_PN : P = N := by
        by_contra h_diff
        have h_le : P ≤ N := (hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup hP
        have h_disj : Disjoint P N := Disjoint.mono_right (le_sSup ⟨hN, h_diff.symm⟩) (D.sSupIndep' h_P_in_D)
        exact hB'' N hN <| disjoint_self.mp (Disjoint.mono_left h_le h_disj) ▸ hP
      rwa [h_PN]
    · rintro rfl
      exact h_N_in_B
  exact h_ne h_B_eq
